subjects.description: Majestic Tyrannosaurus Rex surfing a towering prehistoric ocean wave.
subjects.appearance_details: Deep earthy green scales with darker brown stripes, massive head, sharp teeth, robust torso, muscular tail balancing behind it, wet highlights across textured skin.
subjects.relationship: Single heroic dinosaur subject riding the wave as the central action figure.
subjects.location: Center of the wave face on a surfboard like stance, surrounded by foamy prehistoric sea.
subjects.relative_size: Huge compared with fish and spray, yet the wave rises about twice its height.
subjects.orientation: Facing diagonally down the wave toward camera left, body twisted for balance.
subjects.pose: Crouched athletic surfing stance with tail extended as a rudder and tiny arms lifted for balance.
subjects.action: Rides down the curling face of a massive foamy wave with surprising grace.
subjects.state_changes: Starts dropping into the wave, carves along the crest through the middle, exits in spray with tail correcting balance.
subjects.expression: Fierce, focused, exhilarated, mouth partly open to show teeth.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Rough scaly green hide with darker striping, wet reflective texture from sea spray.
subjects.facial_features: Large skull, sharp teeth, heavy brow, forward facing predatory eyes, broad snout.

background_setting: Vast ancient ocean under warm golden sunlight, schools of fish darting below the clear surface, distant prehistoric coastline barely visible through sea haze.

lighting.conditions: Golden sun glints through spray, bright highlights on foam, warm reflections across the wave and wet dinosaur scales.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Golden sun glints through spray, bright highlights on foam, warm reflections across the wave and wet dinosaur scales.

aesthetics.composition: Exhilarating, surreal but physically grounded, cinematic adventure, dynamic water, playful prehistoric spectacle.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Exhilarating, surreal but physically grounded, cinematic adventure, dynamic water, playful prehistoric spectacle.

cinematography.camera_motion: Wide action shot tracking beside the wave, slight slow motion on spray, strong diagonal composition emphasizing speed and height.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: High energy realistic fantasy text to video with detailed creature animation and ocean simulation.
artistic_style: Blockbuster cinematic realism with adventurous color grading and crisp water detail.
context: A powerful T Rex improbably surfs a huge wave in a sunlit prehistoric sea while marine life flashes below.

actions.description: The T Rex drops onto the wave face, claws spread and tail swinging to stabilize its balance.
It carves across the foamy wall of water as fish scatter beneath and golden spray bursts around its legs.
The dinosaur rides out through a plume of foam, tail correcting its line as the crest curls behind it.

segments.description: Huge green striped T Rex begins its descent on a towering ocean wave.
segments.key_changes: Huge green striped T Rex begins its descent on a towering ocean wave.
segments.camera: Wide action shot tracking beside the wave, slight slow motion on spray, strong diagonal composition emphasizing speed and height.

segments.description: Foamy crest rises above the dinosaur, fish shimmer below, spray catches sunlight.
segments.key_changes: Foamy crest rises above the dinosaur, fish shimmer below, spray catches sunlight.
segments.camera: Wide action shot tracking beside the wave, slight slow motion on spray, strong diagonal composition emphasizing speed and height.

segments.description: The T Rex bursts through white spray against the ancient sea horizon.
segments.key_changes: The T Rex bursts through white spray against the ancient sea horizon.
segments.camera: Wide action shot tracking beside the wave, slight slow motion on spray, strong diagonal composition emphasizing speed and height.

temporal_caption: 0:00-0:02 a T Rex drops into a giant prehistoric wave. 0:02-0:05 it surfs with its tail acting as a rudder. 0:05-0:07 it exits through glowing foam and spray.
audio_description: Roaring surf, explosive foam, splashing water, distant seabirds, low dinosaur growl mixed with rushing wind.
